figures.caption: Table 1: Perplexity and training time comparisons across a variety of attention equations. L1 projection dimensions are shown as subscripts to model names, e.g. L18 projects the queries and keys from dk 64 down to 8. Model L18/RBF uses 8 dimensional projections in the lower heads and the Kim RBFL2 decrement in the upper heads with no projections.
Figure 1: Optimal Dimensionality as a Bias-Variance Tradeoff From Landauer, Foltz, & Laham (1998)
Table 2: Pearson correlations between norm variance and λ values
